parameters: 視差をタイルに連動 = true
完了までウェイト = true
skit pose エリィ t damage 15
skit fadeIn エリィ f right
完了までウェイト = true
skit expression エリィ t default
skit moveIn マナ t left 10 left easeOut

\SM[nod]Phew...I made it...! I'm in time! Hah...hah...! Hiiii~...! S-sorry...! Let me catch
my breath for a second...! Phew...!

... \.!\SE[6]\SM[pop2]\COM[exc]Alright! It's been a while, Elly-chan! I've...I've wanted to
see you for so long!
完了までウェイト = false

\SE[13]\SM[sexhara1]...! Th-that's...that's my line! We haven't seen each other for a year...I was so
lonely...! I've been waiting all this time...! Waaah...!

\SE[8]\SM[sexhara1]...Yeah, I'm sorry... We were so caught up in our own dreams... We...we didn't
properly think about you, Elly-chan.

\SE[12]Mmm, uuu~...! Sob... ...N-no...! I'm the one who should be apologizing...! I...I kept
lying to myself, and I couldn't be honest with either of you...!

\SE[13]I wanted to stay with my brother and Mana-chan forever...! But I acted stubborn and
grown-up, putting on a brave face as I sent you both off...! I could never say what I
really felt...It's my fault...!

\SE[7]...No, that's not true. The one at fault is me... If I hadn't thought those things,
this ending probably wouldn't have happened...
完了までウェイト = false

\SE[9]...You know, I've always wanted to apologize to you, Elly-chan. About that time when
we were kids, playing house... I really wanted to be the one to play \n[1]'s bride...

\SE[2]...I ended up saying it without thinking, didn't I? That siblings can't get
married... That time...do you remember, Elly-chan?

\SE[7]I shouldn't have said that back then. I was jealous of you, Elly-chan, and I wanted
to have \n[1] all to myself... I tried to take your brother away from you...

\SE[10]...B-but that's normal for everyone, isn't it? Mana-chan was just telling the
truth... The one who didn't know...the one who was wrong was me...

\SE[8]\SM[sexhara1]That's not true, Elly-chan. Not being able to be with the person you love is wrong.
Your feelings aren't wrong.

\SE[2]...I'm sorry, Elly-chan. I knew how you felt all along. But I pretended not to see it
and took \n[1] away with me...

\SE[1]\SM[pop2]...But from now on! I want you to be happy, enough to make up for all the times you
held back! You and \n[1], together forever...!

\SE[5]...That's enough talking. I'm really glad I got to see you one last time, Elly-chan.
But there's no time left...You have to go back to the village.

\SE[12]\SM[sexhara1]...! No! Come with me, Mana-chan! Just being by your side is enough for me...! That's
all I need!

\SE[7]...No, I can't. The two of you are going to walk a different path from everyone else
now. I can't follow you on that path.

\SE[13]\SM[double]...! N-no way...! No, I don't want that...! I need Mana-chan with me too...!
Waaah...!
\SE[4]O-oh, Elly-chan...! There, there...! You're a grown-up now, so no crying...!
完了までウェイト = false

\SM[sexhara1]Waaah, Mana-chan...! I'm sorry, I'm so sorry...It's my fault, because of me...! Ugh,
sob...! Waaah...!
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true

\SE[default]Hehe...Well then, go save \n[1]! Don't worry! I know the power of those eyes better
than anyone!
...Onii-chan... That's right...I have to save Onii-chan...

\SE[5]If you go that way, you'll reach the village! Walk straight ahead, don't look back...
...Don't come back halfway!
\SE[default]...... Goodbye, Elly-chan... Meeting you two made me truly happy.

\SE[13]...hic... m, mmph... I'm the one who should say that... Thank you for everything,
Mana-chan... ...See you again, Mana-chan...

完了までウェイト = true

skit fadeIn エリィ f right
skit fadeIn マナ f left

...... Hey, if... if we could be reborn next time... and be together again, the three
of us...

\SE[6]\SM[pop2]\COM[exc]Next time, let's go on an adventure together! That would definitely be more
fun!

\SE[13]...! Y-yeah! Next time, I'll definitely keep up...! No matter what happens, I won't
leave you two again...! Hic, ugh...!

\SE[1]...! Hehe~, you said it, Elly-chan...! It's a promise! Next time, I'll definitely
take you with us!
skit pose エリィ t damage 8
skit fadeIn エリィ f right
skit fadeIn マナ f left

...Come on, Elly-chan? If we don't hurry, \n[1] will be waiting? Please go save that
person I love so much?

\SE[5]Hehe... \n[1] has always protected you, Elly-chan...! It's okay if your little sister
protects you for once, right!
skit pose エリィ t damage 12
skit fadeIn エリィ f right
skit fadeIn マナ f left

\SE[8]Mmm...don't make that face? If my best friend is sad, I'll be sad too~...! I want
Elly-chan to be smiling!

\SE[6]\SM[double]S-so cute~! Little Elly-chan is just too adorable~...! Wah~...! I really wanted
Elly-chan as my little sister~...!

\SE[3]Mmm, if you're gonna say that...! I was thinking I'd like Mana-chan as my little
sister too!
\SE[1]Wah~, is that so~...Elly-chan also, me........? \. \.\SE[3]\COM[exc]Huh? m-my little sister!?
\SE[3]\SM[tremble]Wait a sec, Elly-chan!? I'm the big sister! I'm older than Elly-chan, you know!?

\SE[2]...Huh? No, I know that, but... Mana-chan, with that cuteness, you can't be the big
sister, right?

Mmm, mmm... \.\COM[exc]\SE[6]Well, fine! Either way! If I can be with Elly-chan forever,
I'll become the little sister!

\SE[13]...h, h, ........w-well, me too...! If I can be with Mana-chan, either way is
fine~...! Sniff! ...Waaah~~~n...!

\SE[4]\COM[blow]Ah geez, don't cry, Elly-chan...! Here's a handkerchief! Blow your nose,
chiiin~...?

........ \.\SE[6]\SM[pop2]Hehe~! That's some high big sister points, right~? With this, I'm
one step ahead as the big sister!

Sniff... \.\SE[9]H, hehe...what's with those points........ Where did those come from...?
Hehe........
skit pose エリィ t damage 8
skit fadeIn エリィ f right
skit fadeIn マナ f left

......Elly-chan, I want to talk with you much, much more too, but... I'm going to be
late soon...

\SE[5]...Well then, Elly-chan. I've always cherished you like a little sister... I'll watch
over you forever, hoping you and \n[1] can be happy.

\SE[2]...One last thing, Elly-chan. That power you received from "that child"... is the
Demon King's Evil Eye, which plunges people into terror and commands monsters.

\SE[7]That power will be a great help in carving out your difficult path... but at the same
time, your heart will be tormented by its cursed power... You might even forget your
love for others.

\SE[5]But it's okay! Because \n[1] is by your side! With the power of your love, I'm sure you
won't change!

\SE[8]...But, if something ever happens to \n[1] in the distant future...... I'll come to
save you! So don't worry! Live the rest of your life happily!
skit pose エリィ t damage 10
skit fadeIn エリィ f right
skit fadeIn マナ f left

...Well then, Elly-chan. Since this really, truly is the end... will you listen to
what I want to say?
\SE[2]Phew･･･\.\.\SE[1]\SM[pop2]\COM[exc]Elly-chan! Thank you for teaching me so, so many things!

\SE[5]Because of you, I was able to grow into such a fine adult! I traveled the world and
made so many people smile! With the cookies you taught me, I could make the person I
love happy!

\SE[8]I... I hated my old self, who was timid and withdrawn...! That's why, Elly-chan! I
wanted to be like you...! I kept chasing after your back...! And that's how I got
here...!

...! .........! Even without that kind of power... Elly-chan, you're such an amazing
girl! Why...! Why did it have to end up like this!? U, ugh...!

\SE[11]...U, hehe........ Sorry, I promised myself I wouldn't cry... Getting old makes you
tear up so easily, it's awful, really.........

\SE[12].........I love you, Elly-chan. I will never forget you... never forget you two
siblings. ...Meeting you two made me so happy.
対象キャラ名 = マナ

...Goodbye, Elly-chan. Please, don't cry anymore... Forget about me, look ahead...
and live.........

\SE[13]Mana-chan!? Wait!? I still... I still want to be with you, Mana-chaaan!! Waaah...!
I'm sorry...! Mana-cha...! Waaah...!

\SM[sexhara1]...Guh, hic........ Don't tell me not to cry... don't say that at the end........ If
Mana-chan tells me that, I... h, ugh........
